item.title: 匿名模型「快乐马」HappyHorse-1.0 屠榜 AI 视频榜单
item.guid: 匿名模型「快乐马」HappyHorse-1.0-屠榜-AI-视频榜单
item.description:
Yesterday, an anonymous AI video generation model named HappyHorse-1.0 suddenly appeared on the Video Arena ranking list of the authoritative AI evaluation platform Artificial Analysis, and topped multiple tracks with an overwhelming posture. 昨天，一个名为 HappyHorse-1.0 的匿名 AI 视频生成模型突然出现在权威 AI 评测平台 Artificial Analysis 的 Video Arena 榜单上，并以压倒性姿态登顶多个赛道。

    In the text-to-video (no audio) track, HappyHorse-1.0 ranked first with an Elo score of 1332, leading the second-place Dreamina Seedance 2.0 by nearly 60 points;

    In the image-to-video (no audio) track, it even scored a high of 1391, breaking the historical record for that ranking list;

    Even in the audio track, which has extremely high requirements for audio-visual collaboration, the model still ranks second globally, only behind Seedance 2.0 .

HappyHorse-1.0 was launched in an extremely low-key manner—no product launch event, no technical blog, and no corporate endorsement. Its official website, happyhorse.app, offers two modes: text-to-video and image-to-video, supporting native 1080p output, and emphasizing multi-shot narrative consistency and smooth motion synthesis. It is free to register and use. HappyHorse-1.0 的发布方式极为低调——没有产品发布会，没有技术博客，也没有任何企业背书。其官网 happyhorse.app 提供文本转视频与图像转视频两种模式，支持原生 1080p 输出，并强调多镜头叙事一致性与流畅动作合成，免费注册即可使用。

Netizen Vigo Zhao (@VigoCreativeAI) posted on X, stating that after comparing HappyHorse-1.0's public benchmark data with known models item by item, it was found to be highly consistent with daVinci-MagiHuman, which was open-sourced on GitHub in March this year: 网友 Vigo Zhao (@VigoCreativeAI) 在 X 上发文称，将 HappyHorse-1.0 的公开基准数据与已知模型逐项比对后，发现其与今年 3 月在 GitHub 开源的 daVinci-MagiHuman 高度吻合：

Multiple data points such as visual quality, text alignment, physical consistency, and speech character error rate are almost perfectly matched, and the presentation style of the official website's architecture description, performance tables, and demo videos are also identical.

daVinci-MagiHuman was officially open-sourced on March 23 this year, jointly developed by the Generative AI Research Lab (GAIR) of Shanghai Innovation Institute (SII) and Beijing Sand.ai (Shali Technology). daVinci-MagiHuman 于今年 3 月 23 日正式开源，由上海创新研究院（SII）生成式人工智能研究实验室（GAIR）与北京 Sand.ai（沙砾科技）联合开发。

item.title: 阿里巴巴 AI 大重组：设技术委员会、建 ATH 事业群，电商向 Token 经济转型
item.guid: 阿里巴巴-AI-大重组：设技术委员会、建-ATH-事业群，电商向-Token-经济转型
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, Alibaba Group CEO Eddie Wu yesterday issued an internal letter announcing AI-related organizational adjustments, including the establishment of a new Group Technology Committee, the upgrade of the Tongyi Large Model Business Unit, and the acceleration of AI development. 据新浪科技报道，阿里巴巴集团 CEO 吴泳铭昨天发布内部信，宣布 AI 相关组织调整，包括新设立集团技术委员会，升级通义大模型事业部，加速 AI 建设。

According to the internal letter, Alibaba has established a Technology Committee at the group level, with Eddie Wu as the head, and members including Jingren Zhou, Zeming Wu, and Feifei Li. Among them, Jingren Zhou serves as the Chief AI Architect of the Technology Committee, Feifei Li is responsible for Alibaba Cloud technology and AI cloud infrastructure construction, and Zeming Wu is responsible for the group's business technology platform and AI inference platform construction. 根据内部信，阿里巴巴在集团层面设立技术委员会，由吴泳铭担任组长，成员包括周靖人、吴泽明、李飞飞。其中，周靖人担任技术委员会首席 AI 架构师，李飞飞负责阿里云技术以及 AI 云基础设施建设，吴泽明负责集团业务技术平台以及 AI 推理平台建设。

To accelerate AI development, Alibaba will also upgrade the Tongyi Lab to the Tongyi Large Model Business Unit, led by Jingren Zhou; Feifei Li will serve as Alibaba Cloud CTO; Zeming Wu will focus on his role as Alibaba Group CTO, and the CEO position of Taobao Flash Sale will be taken over by Yanqun Lei. 围绕加速 AI 建设的整体目标，阿里还将通义实验室升级为通义大模型事业部，由周靖人负责；李飞飞出任阿里云 CTO；吴泽明专注阿里巴巴集团 CTO 工作，淘宝闪购 CEO 职务由雷雁群接任。

According to 36Kr, Eddie Wu also proposed forming a new Alibaba Token Hub (ATH) business group, requiring all related businesses to commercialize around Tokens, serving as the overarching architecture for the group's AI strategy. 另据 36 氪报道，吴泳铭还提出组建新的 Alibaba Token Hub（ATH）事业群，要求所有关联业务围绕 Token 进行商业化，以此作为集团 AI 战略的统领架构。

Taotian Group's "Smart Search and Recommendation Products" business unit, which carries AI business, was subsequently split into two departments: "Platform Users and Products" and "Smart Algorithms." The original head, Kaifu Zhang, is no longer responsible for this business; the "Future Innovation Business Unit," originally responsible for multimodal directions, has been merged into the ATH business group. 淘天集团承载 AI 业务的「智能搜推产品」事业部随之拆分为「平台用户及产品」和「智能算法」两个部门，原负责人张凯夫不再负责该业务；原负责多模态方向的「未来创新事业部」则并入 ATH 事业群。

On the e-commerce side, Taotian Group will shift its AI strategic focus from AI to C to AI to B this year, with core OKRs adjusted to merchant-side AI tool retention rate and AI-driven GMV growth. It is reported that Taotian plans to upgrade the existing Qianniu platform to "Qianniu Claw" and officially promote it around 618. 电商侧，淘天集团今年将 AI 战略重心从 AI to C 转向 AI to B，核心 OKR 调整为商家侧 AI 工具留存率以及 AI 带动的 GMV 增长。据悉，淘天计划将原有千牛平台升级为「千牛 Claw」，并于 618 前后正式推广。

The core goal of this product is to reduce merchant operating costs, improve operating efficiency, and deploy merchant business systems and data on Alibaba Cloud. Merchants using Qianniu Claw will directly consume Tokens, with costs borne by the merchant alone or shared with service providers. 该产品的核心目标是降低商家经营成本、提升经营效率，同时将商家业务系统与数据部署于阿里云之上。商家使用千牛 Claw 将直接消耗 Token，费用由商家单独或与服务商共担。

item.title: Perplexity Agent 业务爆发，单月 ARR 暴增 50% 突破 4.5 亿美元
item.guid: Perplexity-Agent-业务爆发，单月-ARR-暴增-50%-突破-4.5-亿美元
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Perplexity AI, thanks to the strong performance of its AI agent business, rapidly increased its projected Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) from $305 million to over $450 million in March this year, a single-month increase of 50%. 据《金融时报》报道，Perplexity AI 凭借 AI 智能体业务的强劲表现，在今年 3 月将预计年度经常性收入（ARR）从此前的 3.05 亿美元迅速提升至逾 4.5 亿美元，单月涨幅达 50%。

Behind this growth is Perplexity Computer, a service launched by Perplexity at the end of February this year. This service integrates model capabilities from multiple external vendors, primarily targeting office assistant scenarios for enterprise and individual users. 这一增长背后，是 Perplexity 今年 2 月末推出的 Perplexity Computer 服务。该服务整合多家外部供应商的模型能力，主打面向企业和个人用户的办公助手场景。

Meanwhile, Perplexity has introduced a usage-based pricing model in addition to its monthly subscription, with a company spokesperson stating that its revenue retention rate is "very high." 与此同时，Perplexity 在月付订阅制之外引入了基于使用量的定价模式，一位公司发言人表示，其收入留存率「很高」。

item.title: B 站宣布推出播放页暂停广告
item.guid: B-站宣布推出播放页暂停广告
item.description:
Bilibili (B-site) announced that it will officially launch the "pause ad" feature on its app's playback page on April 10. 哔哩哔哩（B 站）宣布，将于 4 月 10 日在 App 端正式上线播放页暂停广告功能。

This ad format will be probabilistically triggered when users manually pause a video, displayed below the player and labeled "Ad," without covering the video screen. Users can click "X" to close the ad at any time before or after it appears, without affecting the normal playback process. 该广告形式将在用户手动暂停视频时概率触发，展示于播放器下方并标注「广告」字样，不覆盖视频画面。用户可在广告出现前或出现后随时点击「X」关闭，不影响正常播放流程。

In terms of revenue, the earnings from pause ads will be calculated based on conversion effects and displayed merged with UP creators' existing basic incentives. For UP creators who do not wish to participate in this ad format, Bilibili provides an opt-out option, accessible via [Creator Incentive – Ad Settings – Pause Ad Settings]. 收益方面，暂停广告的收益将基于转化效果计算，并与 UP 主现有基础激励合并展示。对于不希望参与该广告形式的 UP 主，B 站提供了自主关闭选项，操作路径为【创作激励 – 广告设置 – 暂停广告设置】。

item.title: Meta 发布首款超级智能实验室模型 Muse Spark
item.guid: Meta-发布首款超级智能实验室模型-Muse-Spark
item.description:
Today, Meta officially released Muse Spark, the first flagship AI model from its Meta Superintelligence Labs . 今天， Meta 正式发布旗下超级智能实验室（Meta Superintelligence Labs）推出的首款旗舰 AI 模型 Muse Spark 。

    Natively supports joint understanding of images, audio, video, and text, with built-in tool invocation, visual chain of thought, and multi-agent coordination capabilities;

    Scored 42.8 in HealthBench Hard open-ended health Q&A, significantly surpassing GPT-5.4's 40.1, Gemini 3.1 Pro's 20.6, and Opus 4.6's 14.8; scored 86.4 in CharXiv Reasoning chart comprehension, also leading competitors;

    At the same performance level, Muse Spark saves 10.3 times more computing power than Llama 4 Maverick Base and 8.2 times more than DeepSeek-V3.1 Base.

However, the shortcomings are equally obvious. It only scored 42.5 points on ARC AGI 2 abstract reasoning puzzles, far behind Gemini 3.1 Pro's 76.5 and GPT-5.4's 76.1; its score on Terminal-Bench 2.0 terminal coding tasks was 59.0, also trailing GPT-5.4's 75.1 and Gemini 3.1 Pro's 68.5. 但短板同样明显。ARC AGI 2 抽象推理谜题上仅得 42.5 分，远落后于 Gemini 3.1 Pro 的 76.5 和 GPT-5.4 的 76.1；Terminal-Bench 2.0 终端编码任务得分 59.0，也落后于 GPT-5.4 的 75.1 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro 的 68.5。

An incident also occurred during the release. Meta highlighted its own model's scores in the evaluation charts, attempting to create a visual impression of comprehensive leadership, which immediately drew criticism from the outside world, with some netizens directly labeling it "chart crime." Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang subsequently issued a public apology. 发布过程中还出现了一段插曲。Meta 在评测图表中对自家模型的成绩进行高亮处理，试图制造出全面领先的视觉观感，随即引发外界批评，有网友直接将此定性为「图表犯罪」。首席 AI 官 Alexandr Wang 随后公开致歉。

Meta stated that the next-generation model (internal codename "Watermelon") is already under development, with coding capability being a key area for improvement. Meta 表示，下一代模型（内部代号「Watermelon」）已在研发中，编码能力将是重点改进方向。

item.title: 在游戏中创建自己的「赛博替身」，索尼推出「玩家基地」计划
item.guid: 在游戏中创建自己的「赛博替身」，索尼推出「玩家基地」计划
item.description:
Sony Interactive Entertainment yesterday officially announced the launch of the "Playerbase" program, open for registration to loyal PlayStation players worldwide. The images of the first selected participants will be scanned and integrated into Gran Turismo 7. 索尼互动娱乐（Sony Interactive Entertainment）昨日正式宣布推出「Playerbase（玩家基地）」计划，面向全球 PlayStation 忠实玩家开放报名，首批入选者的形象将被扫描并植入《GT 赛车 7》（Gran Turismo 7）。

The program is currently open for applications in regions including the Americas, Europe, Asia, South Africa, and Australia, with selection divided into two rounds. 该计划目前已在美洲、欧洲、亚洲、南非及澳大利亚等地区开放申请，选拔分为两轮。

Finally selected participants will be invited to a visual arts studio in Los Angeles to undergo full-body capture using the latest 3D scanning technology. Their images will appear in the game as "limited-time character portraits," presented in a style consistent with existing in-game characters. 最终入选者将受邀前往洛杉矶的视觉艺术工作室，接受最新 3D 扫描技术的全身捕捉，其形象将以「限时角色肖像」的形式出现在游戏内，呈现方式与游戏中现有角色的展现风格保持一致。

Additionally, selected players will participate in designing an exclusive "Fantasy Logo" and a unique vehicle livery, both of which will be permanently included in the game's "Showcase" menu. 此外，入选玩家还将参与设计一款专属「Fantasy Logo」和独一无二的车辆涂装，后两者将被永久收录至游戏的「展示橱窗」菜单中。

Sony stated that it will gradually expand the program to more PlayStation Studios games in the future. 索尼表示，未来将逐步将该计划扩展至更多 PlayStation Studios 旗下游戏。

item.title: 字节成 AI 黄埔军校，核心人才流向 Meta、苹果、OpenAI
item.guid: 字节成-AI-黄埔军校，核心人才流向-Meta、苹果、OpenAI
item.description:
According to LatePost, ByteDance's large model research team, Seed, is experiencing a continuous outflow of talent, covering multiple core areas such as Infra, visual models, reinforcement learning, and products. ByteDance is passively becoming a cradle for a new generation of AI talent. 据晚点 LatePost 报道，字节跳动旗下大模型研究团队 Seed 正经历持续的人才外流，涵盖 Infra、视觉模型、强化学习及产品等多个核心方向，字节正被动成为新一代 AI 人才摇篮。

    The outflow is most concentrated in the Infra direction. ByteDance's engineering capabilities are considered by the industry to be "stronger than any other domestic company," with core personnel such as Xiao Xuefeng, Zhang Chi, and Huang Qi being successively poached, and the team responsible for data processing also being recruited in batches;

    Overseas, Jiang Ziheng has joined Meta, and another researcher is believed to have joined Safe Superintelligence, founded by Ilya Sutskever;

    The visual direction also saw a wave of departures: Huang Qingqing joined OpenAI, Chunyuan Li went to Google DeepMind, Qiao Siyuan joined Meta, and Jiang Lu joined Apple; after Wang Changhu's departure, his company, Aishi Technology, completed a $300 million Series C funding round, setting a record for a single financing in China's video generation sector;

    On the product side, Qi Junyuan's startup project, GUI AI intelligent agent smart terminal, led by the former head of Doubao PC business, has reached a post-investment valuation of hundreds of millions of dollars; Liang Chenqi's new project, led by the former product head of "Maoxiang," received investment from IDG and Meituan.

In response to the outflow, ByteDance announced global salary increases at the end of last year and launched "Doubao shares," a virtual equity incentive specifically for large model talent. In terms of recruitment strategy, after Wu Yonghui joined, Seed shifted to heavily employing young people. In March this year, ByteDance launched its largest intern recruitment drive, hiring 7,000 people globally; 面对外流，字节去年底宣布全球涨薪，并推出专针对大模型人才的虚拟股权激励「豆包股」。招聘策略上，吴永辉入职后 Seed 转向重用年轻人，今年 3 月字节启动最大规模实习生招聘，面向全球招募 7000 人；

In April, Seed launched another campus recruitment drive, planning to hire 100 graduates from the class of 2027. Currently, Seed's algorithm and engineering technical staff remain stable at over 1,000 people. 4 月 Seed 另行启动校招，计划招聘 100 名 2027 届毕业生。目前 Seed 算法与工程技术人员稳定在 1000 余人。

item.title: GoPro 启动大规模裁员：145 人将离职，占员工总数近四分之一
item.guid: GoPro-启动大规模裁员：145-人将离职，占员工总数近四分之一
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, GoPro announced it would cut 23% of its workforce to advance its cost-cutting plan. 据《华尔街日报》报道，GoPro 宣布将裁减 23% 的员工，以推进成本削减计划。

GoPro's board of directors approved a restructuring plan yesterday to lay off 145 employees. This round of layoffs will be executed in the second quarter and is expected to be completed by the end of this year. GoPro anticipates this restructuring will incur related costs of $11.5 million to $15 million, covering severance pay and medical benefits. GoPro 董事会于昨日批准了一项重组计划，将裁员 145 人。本轮裁员将在第二季度内执行，预计于今年年底前完成。GoPro 预计此次重组将产生 1150 万至 1500 万美元的相关费用，涵盖遣散费及医疗福利支出。

The report points out that this is not GoPro's first large-scale layoff in recent years. Last year, the company conducted two rounds of layoffs in the first and third quarters, reducing its workforce by 4% and 25% respectively, bringing the total number of employees down to 696 by the end of last year. 报道指出，这已不是 GoPro 近年来的首次大规模裁员。去年，公司先后在第一季度和第三季度进行了两轮裁员，分别削减了 4% 和 25% 的员工规模，至去年底员工总数降至 696 人。

item.title: 3 月仅售 3.6 万辆，本田中国销量同比大降 34%
item.guid: 3-月仅售-3.6-万辆，本田中国销量同比大降-34%
item.description:
Yesterday, Honda China released its terminal car sales data in China for March 2026. The data shows that Honda's terminal car sales in China for March 2026 were 36,201 units, and the cumulative sales from January to March 2026 were 122,470 units. 昨天，本田中国发布 2026 年 3 月在中国的终端汽车销量数据。数据显示，2026 年 3 月本田在中国的终端汽车销量为 36201 辆，2026 年 1 至 3 月累计销量为 122470 辆。

For reference, Honda's terminal car sales in China for March 2025 were 55,130 units. Based on this, sales in March this year decreased by approximately 34.34% year-on-year, a significant drop. Meanwhile, Honda's cumulative terminal car sales in China surpassed 20 million units during March this year. 作为参考，本田 2025 年 3 月在中国的终端汽车销量为 55130 辆，以此计算，今年 3 月销量同比下降约 34.34%，降幅明显。与此同时，本田在中国汽车累计终端销量于今年 3 月期间突破 2000 万辆。

item.title: 黑小米、黑理想、黑鸿蒙智行：烟台警方破获新型「水军」团伙
item.guid: 黑小米、黑理想、黑鸿蒙智行：烟台警方破获新型「水军」团伙
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, Yantai police in Shandong recently busted two new types of online "astroturfing" gangs specializing in fabricating negative information about new energy vehicle brands. More than 8,000 related online accounts were shut down, and 9 suspects have been legally subjected to criminal coercive measures for allegedly infringing on citizens' personal information. 据新华社报道，山东烟台警方近期破获两个专门针对新能源汽车品牌炮制负面信息的新型网络「水军」团伙，关停相关网络账号 8000 余个，9 名犯罪嫌疑人因涉嫌侵犯公民个人信息罪已被依法采取刑事强制措施。

Since July last year, well-known companies such as Li Auto, Huawei HarmonyOS Smart Cockpit, and Xiaomi have successively reported to the Yantai Public Security Bureau, stating that a large number of negative articles targeting the quality of new energy vehicles of the aforementioned brands and their corporate executives appeared on a certain well-known online platform. 自去年 7 月起，理想汽车、华为鸿蒙智行、小米等知名企业先后向烟台市公安局报警，称某知名网络平台出现大量针对上述品牌新能源汽车质量及企业负责人的负面文章。

These articles either used sensational headlines to attract attention or distorted facts to mislead the public. The content was highly organized, and the IP addresses, posting times, and content of the publishing accounts showed a clear concentrated trend. Taking Li Auto as an example, the report mentioned that its orders plummeted by more than 5,000 units in August last year, and the company's total market value decreased by approximately 20 billion yuan. 这些文章或以耸动标题博取眼球，或歪曲事实误导公众，内容高度组织化，发布账号的 IP 地址、发文时间及内容均呈现明显集中态势。以理想汽车为例，报道提到其去年 8 月其订单锐减 5000 余辆，企业总市值下降约 200 亿元。

The profit model of the newly discovered "astroturfing" gangs is relatively covert: they exploit the platform's traffic-sharing mechanism, earning traffic revenue paid by the platform by mass-producing "smear articles." 此次查获的新型「水军」团伙的牟利模式较为隐蔽：利用平台流量分成机制，通过批量炮制「黑稿」赚取平台支付的流量收益。

The main responsible persons of one of the gangs, Mr. and Mrs. Gao, have cumulatively received over 50 payments from the platform in recent years, totaling approximately 1.8 million yuan; members of another gang mostly have junior or senior high school education, while the principal offender only received primary school education, yet their monthly income can reach two to three hundred thousand yuan. 其中一个团伙的主要负责人高某夫妇近年来累计收到平台打款 50 余笔，共计约 180 万元；另一团伙成员学历多为初高中，主犯仅受过小学教育，1 个月收入可达二三十万元。

These lawbreakers use netizens' opinions and comments as a basis, and through AI software, they reorganize and rewrite hot keywords and content, generating articles with various angles, structures, and wordings with a single click, achieving "zero-cost" mass production. 这些不法分子以网民观点、留言为基础，通过 AI 软件对热点词汇和内容进行重组、改写，一键生成多个角度、结构、措辞各异的文章，实现「零成本」批量化生产。

In terms of account matrix, core members of the gang, such as Yu, used over 30 MCN accounts to control more than 8,000 personal accounts for widespread promotion. These accounts were all purchased in bulk; one MCN account generally costs tens of thousands of yuan, while real-name registered personal accounts only cost tens of yuan, and some account holders are even completely unaware of this. 账号矩阵方面，团伙核心人员于某等人使用 30 多个 MCN 账号，操控 8000 多个个人账号进行地毯式推送。这些账号均为批量购买，1 个 MCN 账号一般需上万元，实名注册的个人账号则仅需几十元，部分账号持有人甚至对此毫不知情。

item.title: 微软：控制面板迁移进行中，但比想像中难一些
item.guid: 微软：控制面板迁移进行中，但比想像中难一些
item.description:
According to Windows Report, Microsoft is advancing its long-term plan to migrate the classic Control Panel to the modern "Settings" app in Windows 11, but this transition is much more complex than anticipated. 据 Windows Report 报道，微软正推进将经典控制面板迁移至 Windows 11 现代「设置」应用的长期计划，但这一过渡比预期复杂得多。

March Rogers, Director of Design Partner at Microsoft, stated that the company is actively migrating all remaining functions from the Control Panel to the new interface, aiming to unify system settings under a single, consistent experience. 微软设计合伙人总监 March Rogers 表示，公司正在积极将控制面板中剩余的所有功能迁移至新界面，目标是将系统设置统一至单一、一致的体验之下。

However, the vast amount of legacy hardware, drivers, and enterprise-level configurations in the Windows ecosystem pose major obstacles—hastily removing the Control Panel could lead to abnormalities in critical functions such as printer management, network configuration, and specialized devices. 然而，Windows 生态系统中庞大的旧硬件、驱动程序及企业级配置构成了主要障碍——贸然移除控制面板，可能导致打印机管理、网络配置及专用设备等关键功能出现异常。

It's worth noting that the Control Panel first appeared with Windows 1.0 in 1985, making it a full 41 years old and having witnessed almost the entire development history of Windows. 值得一提的是，控制面板最早随 1985 年的 Windows 1.0 一同亮相， 距今已有整整 41 年历史 ，几乎见证了 Windows 发展的全部历程。

item.title: 史上最强首秀阵容：宝马携 16 款车型登陆 2026 北京车展
item.guid: 史上最强首秀阵容：宝马携-16-款车型登陆-2026-北京车展
item.description:
BMW Group announced that it will debut at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show with its most powerful lineup ever, bringing a total of 16 new models from its three major brands—BMW, MINI, and BMW Motorrad—including 4 world premieres and 8 China premieres. 宝马集团宣布，将以史上最强大首秀阵容亮相 2026 北京车展，BMW、MINI 和 BMW Motorrad 三大品牌共带来 16 款新车型，其中 4 款全球首发、8 款中国首发。

  • Global Debut of the New BMW 7 Series and New BMW i7

    : As the new generation masterpieces of BMW's flagship sedans, both models adopt a new large luxury car design language and are fully equipped with a new generation of groundbreaking innovative technology clusters, positioned by BMW as "a redefinition of the essence of luxury." 全新 BMW 7 系及全新 BMW i7 的全球首秀 ：作为宝马品牌旗舰轿车的新一代力作，两款车型采用全新大型豪华车设计语言，并全面搭载新世代突破性创新技术集群，被宝马定位为「对豪华本质的重新定义」。
  • The new generation BMW iX3 Long Wheelbase and new generation BMW i3 Long Wheelbase will also have their global premieres in Beijing: these long-wheelbase models further integrate Chinese intelligence, Chinese AI, and localized scenario adaptation based on the standard versions, aiming for a "best to drive, smartest" positioning; 新世代 BMW iX3 长轴距版和新世代 BMW i3 长轴距版也将在北京迎来全球首发：此次长轴距版车型在标准版基础上进一步融入中国智能、中国 AI 与本地化场景适配，主打「最好开、最智能」的定位；
  • The MINI brand will present 14 personalized models, including one global premiere concept car and multiple China premiere models; BMW Motorrad will bring two significant large-displacement motorcycle models. MINI 品牌将携 14 台个性化车型登场，涵盖一款全球首发概念车及多款中国首发车型；BMW Motorrad 则带来两款重磅大排量摩托车型。

BMW will also exhibit the BMW Speedtop concept car for the first time in China, as well as the BMW V12 LMR, which won the overall championship at the Le Mans 24 Hours endurance race. Additionally, special models such as the BMW 4 Series 2026 Sharp Edge Limited Edition and the BMW M3 Touring 40th Anniversary Limited Edition will also be unveiled. BMW 还将在中国首次展出 BMW Speedtop 概念车，以及曾夺得勒芒 24 小时耐力赛全场冠军的 BMW V12 LMR，另有 BMW 4 系 2026 款锋芒限量版、BMW M3 旅行版 40 周年限量版等特别款车型同步亮相。

The 2026 Beijing Auto Show will be held from April 24 to May 3. 2026 北京车展将于 4 月 24 日至 5 月 3 日举行。

item.title: 广电总局公布「AI 魔改」经典影视专项治理成果，违规视频清理超 5 万条
item.guid: 广电总局公布「AI-魔改」经典影视专项治理成果，违规视频清理超-5-万条
item.description:
The National Radio and Television Administration (NRTA) launched a month-long special rectification campaign in January this year, focusing on clearing illegal videos that "AI-magically modify" classic TV series based on the Four Great Classical Novels, historical themes, revolutionary themes, and heroic figures, while also clearing various cult animations. 国家广播电视总局（广电总局）于今年 1 月开展为期一个月的专项治理行动，重点清理基于四大名著、历史题材、革命题材、英模人物等经典电视剧作品进行「AI 魔改」的违规视频，并同步清理各类邪典动画。

During the special rectification period, more than 23,000 illegal videos were removed and over 100 illegal accounts were dealt with. As of March 31 this year, major online audio-visual platforms have cumulatively removed nearly 29,000 illegal videos and dealt with over 40 illegal accounts.

The National Radio and Television Administration stated that it will continue to monitor the development trends of AI technology, strengthen value guidance, build a strong cultural security defense line, and promote the continuous purification of the online audio-visual ecosystem. 广电总局表示，将持续关注 AI 技术发展动态，强化价值引领，筑牢文化安全防线，推动网络视听生态持续净化。

item.title: 💡 牛津、MIT 最新研究：用 AI 做题 10 分钟，独立解题能力就开始下滑
item.guid: 💡-牛津、MIT-最新研究：用-AI-做题-10-分钟，独立解题能力就开始下滑
item.description:
Recently, a joint team from Carnegie Mellon University, Oxford University, MIT, and UCLA published a new research finding, providing causal evidence through the largest randomized controlled experiment to date: using AI to assist in problem-solving not only leads to a decline in independent problem-solving ability but also makes people give up thinking faster . 近日，来自卡内基梅隆大学、牛津大学、MIT 及加州大学洛杉矶分校的联合团队发布了一篇最新研究成果，通过迄今最大规模的随机对照实验提供因果证据： 使用 AI 辅助解题，不仅让人独立解题能力下滑，还会让人更快放弃思考 。

The research team recruited 1222 participants, divided into two groups: "AI-assisted" and "fully independent," to complete fraction calculation and reading comprehension tasks. In the final independent testing phase after AI assistance was removed, the AI-assisted group's answer accuracy was significantly lower than the control group (Experiment 1: 0.57 vs 0.73). 研究团队招募 1222 名参与者，分为「有 AI 辅助」与「全程独立」两组，分别完成分数计算和阅读理解任务。在最终撤走 AI 的独立测试环节，AI 辅助组的答题正确率显著低于对照组（实验一：0.57 vs 0.73）。

More critically, the proportion of participants who directly gave up answering was also significantly higher. This means that AI's impact is not just "getting it wrong," but "not wanting to do it anymore"—motivation itself was eroded. The study further broke down how AI was used: 更关键的是，他们直接放弃作答的比例也明显更高。这意味着 AI 的影响不只是「做不对」，而是「不想做了」——动力本身被侵蚀了。研究进一步拆解了 AI 的使用方式：

61% of participants chose to directly ask AI for answers, and this group's test scores were at the bottom among all groups, showing a significant decline compared to their own pre-experiment levels; while those participants who only asked AI for hints and derived answers themselves were almost unaffected negatively.

In other words, "letting AI think for you" and "letting AI help you think" yield completely different results. The above effects can be produced with only about 10 to 15 minutes of AI interaction. The researchers provided two explanations: 换句话说，「让 AI 替你想」和「让 AI 帮你想」，结果截然不同。 上述效应仅需约 10 至 15 分钟的 AI 交互即可产生。研究者给出了两个解释：

    First, "reference point shift": after getting used to AI providing instant answers, independent thinking feels "abnormally strenuous," triggering an impulse to give up, and this mechanism self-reinforces;

    Second, "self-perception deprivation": people can only build an accurate judgment of their own abilities by independently overcoming difficulties. AI skips this entire process, leading to people neither accumulating experience nor daring to believe they can do it.

The paper clearly states that this is not a call to "stop using AI," but it does require people's vigilance: current AI systems are optimized more for "making users satisfied in the moment" rather than "helping users grow long-term." 论文明确指出，这不是「别用 AI」的呼吁，但需要引起人们的警觉：当前 AI 系统更多是针对「让用户当下满意」优化，而非「帮用户长期成长」。

The researchers believe that superficial interventions (such as limiting usage time) are only treating the symptoms. The real solution is to redesign AI's collaboration methods—like a good teacher, sometimes intentionally not giving answers. 研究者认为，表层干预（如限制使用时间）只是治标，真正的解法是重新设计 AI 的协作方式——像好老师一样，有时候故意不给答案。

📖 Full paper: arxiv.org/pdf/2604.04721 📖 论文全文：arxiv.org/pdf/2604.04721

item.title: OPPO Pad Mini 屏幕边框曝光
item.guid: OPPO-Pad-Mini-屏幕边框曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, Qiao Jiadong, OPPO's Director of Smart Ecosystem Products, released a video and unveiled the front view of the OPPO Pad Mini. 昨日，OPPO 智能生态产品总监乔家栋发布视频，并且公布了 OPPO Pad Mini 的正面情况。

From the leaked information, the OPPO Pad Mini is equipped with a narrow-bezel, center-punched screen and features a large R-angle design. 从漏出的信息来看，OPPO Pad Mini 配备一块窄边的居中打孔屏幕，并且采用大 R 角设计。

According to previous news from Digital Chat Station, the OPPO Pad Mini features an 8.8-inch OLED screen with a 3:2 aspect ratio; it is powered by a Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor and an 8000mAh battery (supporting 67W fast charging); its thickness is 5.39mm and weighs 279g. 据数码闲聊站此前消息，OPPO Pad Mini 采用 8.8 英寸 OLED 屏幕，比例为 3:2；搭载骁龙 8 Gen 5 处理器以及 8000mAh 电池（支持 67W 快充）；厚度为 5.39mm，重量为 279g。

The new device will be released on April 21st, and OPPO will also launch the large-screen tablet OPPO Pad 5 Pro at that time: featuring a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5 and a 13.2-inch large screen. 新机将于 4 月 21 日发布，届时 OPPO 还将推出大屏平板 OPPO Pad 5 Pro：搭载骁龙 8 Elite Gen5，采用 13.2 英寸大屏。

item.title: 小米官网意外「剧透」：小米 17T 系列与 REDMI Pad 2 9.7 或本月发布
item.guid: 小米官网意外「剧透」：小米-17T-系列与-REDMI-Pad-2-9.7-或本月发布
item.description:
According to XiaomiTime, Xiaomi's official UK support page recently accidentally leaked information about several unreleased new products. 据 XiaomiTime 报道，小米官方英国支持页面近日意外泄露了旗下多款未发布新品的信息。

When listing the compatible devices for the "YouTube Premium 3-month free trial" activity, the page prematurely disclosed the existence of four devices: Xiaomi 17T, Xiaomi 17T Pro, REDMI Pad 2 9.7, and REDMI Pad 2 9.7 4G, hinting that these new products might be released as early as April. 该页面在列举「YouTube Premium 3 个月免费试用」活动的适配设备名单时，提前披露了小米 17T、小米 17T Pro、REDMI Pad 2 9.7 及 REDMI Pad 2 9.7 4G 四款设备的存在，并暗示这几款新品最快 4 月发布。

In terms of processors, the Xiaomi 17T is expected to feature the MediaTek Dimensity 8500 chip, focusing on energy efficiency and sustained performance; the Xiaomi 17T Pro will be equipped with the flagship Dimensity 9500 and is expected to feature a 165Hz refresh rate screen. 在处理器方面，小米 17T 预计将搭载联发科天玑 8500 芯片，主打能效与持续性能表现；小米 17T Pro 则配备旗舰级天玑 9500，并预计搭载 165Hz 刷新率屏幕。

The REDMI Pad 2 9.7 series is positioned as an entry-level media consumption device, featuring a MediaTek Helio series processor and supporting 33W fast charging. REDMI Pad 2 9.7 系列则定位入门级媒体消费设备，搭载联发科 Helio 系列处理器，支持 33W 快充。

item.title: 智谱官宣开源最强编程模型 GLM-5.1
item.guid: 智谱官宣开源最强编程模型-GLM-5.1
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhipu AI officially announced the open-sourcing of its flagship AI agent engineering model GLM-5.1, continuing to use the permissive MIT license, supporting personal and commercial use. 昨天，智谱 AI 正式宣布开源旗舰级 AI 智能体工程模型 GLM-5.1，并继续沿用宽松的 MIT 许可证，支持个人及商业用途。

GLM-5.1 is Zhipu's strongest flagship model released to date, with its core design goal being to continuously and effectively execute AI agent tasks over a longer time span. GLM-5.1 是智谱迄今发布的最强旗舰模型，其核心设计目标是在更长时间跨度内持续有效地执行 AI 智能体任务。

According to reports, GLM-5.1 can work independently and continuously for over 8 hours in a single task, during which it autonomously plans, executes, and self-iterates, ultimately delivering complete engineering-grade results. 据介绍，GLM-5.1 能够在单次任务中独立、持续工作超过 8 小时，期间自主规划、执行、自我迭代，最终交付完整的工程级成果。

In the officially released programming capability evaluation, GLM-5.1 scored 45.3 points, only 2.6 points behind Claude Opus 4.6's 47.9 points . Compared to the previous generation GLM-5's 35.4 points, a single iteration improved by nearly 10 points, an increase of approximately 28%. 在官方公布的编程能力评测中，GLM-5.1 得分 45.3 分， 与 Claude Opus 4.6 的 47.9 分仅差 2.6 分 。与上一代 GLM-5 的 35.4 分相比，单次迭代提升近 10 分，升幅约 28%。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-5 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-5

🤗 HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-5.1 🤗 HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-5.1

👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/ZhipuAI/GLM-5.1 👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/ZhipuAI/GLM-5.1

item.title: 8.88 万元起，埃安 RT super 把换电技术拉进大众市场
item.guid: 8.88-万元起，埃安-RT-super-把换电技术拉进大众市场
item.description:
GAC Aion and CATL have jointly launched the RT super, bringing battery swap technology, previously concentrated in the 300,000 to 400,000 yuan price range, into the mass-market family car segment with a battery rental purchase price of 88,800 yuan and a 99-second battery swap speed. 广汽埃安与宁德时代联手推出的 RT super，以 8.88 万元的电池租用购车价和 99 秒换电速度，将此前集中于 30 ~ 40 万元区间的换电技术带入大众家用轿车市场。

    The RT super adopts "vehicle-battery separation" technology, achieving a full charge in 99 seconds and a range of 505 km;

    GAC Aion, in collaboration with CATL, is advancing its layout with a "vehicle + station" dual-wheel drive, with over 1,000 CATL Chocolate battery swap stations nationwide currently serving Aion models, an estimated 3,000 to be built this year, and a long-term goal of 30,000 stations;

    Regarding usage costs, the RT super battery rental is as low as 399 yuan per month, which translates to about 13.3 yuan per day, and also supports charging;

    Equipped with 25 features including front seat ventilation and heating, electric tailgate, dual panoramic sunroofs and dual electric sunshades, Sentry Mode, whole-car intelligent voice control, and L2 intelligent driving assistance.

item.title: QQ 浏览器上线「龙虾」QBotClaw：免安装、可远程操控电脑
item.guid: QQ-浏览器上线「龙虾」QBotClaw：免安装、可远程操控电脑
item.description:
Yesterday, QQ Browser officially released QBotClaw, the country's first browser "Lobster," which can be used directly by opening QQ Browser and clicking on the "AI" entry. The initial version has been launched on the Mac platform, with the Windows version to follow soon. 昨天，QQ 浏览器正式发布国内首个浏览器「龙虾」QBotClaw，打开 QQ 浏览器点击「AI」入口即可直接使用。首期版本已上线 Mac 平台，Windows 版本将于近期跟进。

QBotClaw is officially positioned as a "seeing and thinking" browser-native AI agent, supporting users to freely configure API Keys for mainstream domestic large models, and built-in with QQ Browser Skills' high-precision web page recognition capability (x5use technology): QBotClaw 官方将其定位为「有眼有脑」的浏览器原生 AI 智能体，支持用户自由配置国内主流大模型 API Key，并内置 QQ 浏览器 Skills 高精度网页识别能力（x5use 技术）：

    Comes with browser context memory, capable of directly retrieving user login status, favorites, downloaded files, and other information, understanding and completing tasks without repeatedly judging the environment;

    Relies on x5use high-precision recognition technology to identify complex web page elements, achieving precise understanding and control of complex web interfaces.

In terms of remote control scenarios, QBotClaw, with the help of WeChat Clawbot, supports sending commands from mobile phones to remotely control computers, completing cross-software operations, information retrieval, and file processing. Official demonstration use cases include organizing desktops, price comparison for shopping, searching for information, and automatically editing documents. 在远程控制场景方面，QBotClaw 借助微信 Clawbot 支持手机端发送指令远程调动电脑，完成跨软件操作、信息抓取及文件处理。官方演示的使用场景包括整理桌面、购物比价、查找资料及自动编辑文档等。

item.title: 智元 Genie Sim 3.0 发布：一句话生成 3D 训练世界，仿真评测误差不超 10%
item.guid: 智元-Genie-Sim-3.0-发布：一句话生成-3D-训练世界，仿真评测误差不超-10%
item.description:
AGIBOT by Zhiyuan officially released its simulation development platform, Genie Sim 3.0, yesterday, covering the entire process from environment generation, scenario generalization, and data collection to model evaluation, with its code now open-sourced on GitHub. 智元 AGIBOT 昨天正式发布仿真开发平台 Genie Sim 3.0，覆盖环境生成、场景泛化、数据采集到模型评测的全流程，代码已开源至 GitHub。

    Genie Sim World: Users can generate an interactive 3D training world through a multimodal large model by inputting a natural language sentence or an image, with generation speed compressed from "hours" to "minutes," supporting synchronous output of multimodal data such as RGB, depth, and lidar;

    Genie Sim Benchmark: Designed evaluation suites for five major capabilities: language instruction understanding, spatial relationship cognition, atomic skill operation, environmental perturbation adaptation, and zero-shot cross-domain transfer, supporting mainstream foundation models such as the π series and GR00T series. Official data shows that the evaluation difference between simulation and the real world is less than 10%;

    Genie Sim x RLinf: A deeply integrated reinforcement learning framework, RLinf, decouples the physics and rendering engines, supports 1000 Hz high-precision physics simulation, provides a standard Gym interface, and can seamlessly adapt to community algorithm environments.

Zhiyuan stated that the Genie Sim x RLinf solution aims to address the shortcomings of VLA models in fine-grained operations, using low-cost reinforcement learning post-training to bridge the gap from "generalized understanding" to "precise micro-manipulation." 智元表示，Genie Sim x RLinf 方案旨在补齐 VLA 模型在精细操作上的短板，以低成本强化学习后训练打通从「泛化理解」到「精准微操」的路径。

item.title: 星巴克中国发布「千店千面」战略
item.guid: 星巴克中国发布「千店千面」战略
item.description:
Starbucks China officially announced yesterday that the strategic cooperation between Starbucks Global and Boyu Capital has officially launched. Starbucks China simultaneously released its new future-oriented development strategy, "A Thousand Stores, A Thousand Faces," to strengthen local innovation and empower partners to create "one store, one community." 星巴克中国昨日正式宣布，星巴克全球与博裕投资的战略合作已正式启动，星巴克中国同步发布面向未来的全新发展战略「千店千面」，强化在地创新，赋能伙伴打造「一店一社区」。

Product Level , coffee remains the core: 产品层面 ，咖啡仍是核心：

    The light-roasted coffee bean "Chun He Jing Ming" has officially launched, filling the gap for the lightest roast in its roasting curve;

    Starbucks will invest in new brewing equipment in over 1,000 office building and business district stores, launching "Daily Fresh Brew" coffee, with a daily black coffee and milk coffee combination to cover the needs of daily commuters;

    This summer, more fruit-flavored coffees and iced shaken tea new products will be launched, and Frappuccinos will undergo a comprehensive upgrade. The "Daily Fresh Baked" platform will also accelerate its rollout.

Regarding store expansion, Starbucks China will proceed in a more focused and steady manner, expanding to over 1,500 county-level administrative regions in the next three years; store formats will be more flexible and diverse to precisely meet the needs of different communities. 门店拓展方面，星巴克中国将以更聚焦、更稳健的方式推进，未来三年将扩展至 1500 个县级以上行政区；门店形态将更加灵活多样，以精准满足不同社区需求。

At the AI application level, Starbucks China launched the "1000 AI Chief Growth Officers (CGO) Program," using AI as a smart avatar for each store to deeply root in communities, get closer to customers, and strengthen personalized relationships between stores and customers; the store manager AI assistant is simultaneously upgraded, covering back-office affairs such as ordering and scheduling, as well as new business scenarios like meeting tea breaks and AI ordering. AI 应用层面，星巴克中国推出「1000 位 AI 首席增长官（CGO）计划」，以 AI 作为每家门店的智慧分身，深度扎根社区、贴近顾客，强化门店与顾客之间的个性化关系；门店经理 AI 助手同步升级，覆盖订货、排班等后勤事务，以及会议茶歇、AI 点单等新业务场景。

item.title: 喜茶 x Hello Kitty 推出春季限定茶饮
item.guid: 喜茶-x-Hello-Kitty-推出春季限定茶饮
item.description:
Yesterday, Heytea officially announced the launch of a spring collaboration with Hello Kitty China, with the new product "Sakura Guava White Peach" simultaneously going online. 昨天，喜茶官宣与中国 Hello Kitty 开启春季联名活动，新品「樱花芭乐白桃」同步上线。

This collaboration continues the "childlike innocence" theme of the 2024 Christmas "Elderberry" series, centering on Hello Kitty's "companionship" attribute, combined with the healing function of tea beverages, aiming to convey the brand philosophy of "guarding the inner fairy tale." 此次联名延续 2024 年圣诞「不老莓」系列的「童心」主题，以 Hello Kitty 的「陪伴」属性为核心，结合茶饮的治愈功能，旨在传递「守护内心童话」的品牌理念。

The new "Sakura Guava White Peach" features a layered flavor design: the top note is the sweet aroma of ripe seasonal red heart guava and 36-degree north latitude juicy white peach; the middle note is a fresh and mellow oolong base blended from Fujian Quanzhou/Sanming Oolong and Taiwan Nantou Oolong; the base note is adorned with Sichuan Mianyang Guanshan cherry blossoms, forming a delicate cherry fragrance. 新品「樱花芭乐白桃」采用分层风味设计：前调为当季红心芭乐与北纬 36 度爆汁白桃的熟果甜香；中调由福建泉州 / 三明乌龙与中国台湾南投乌龙拼配成鲜醇乌龙基底；尾调以四川绵阳关山樱花瓣点缀形成淡淡樱香。

The collaboration's accompanying materials and merchandise system were simultaneously launched yesterday; offline themed store activities will start this Friday, covering 15 designated stores including Guangzhou Tianhuan Plaza LAB Store and Shenzhen One Avenue DP Store (specific list pending), continuing until April 12th. 联名配套物料与周边体系于昨日同步启动发放；线下主题门店活动将于本周五启动，覆盖广州天环广场 LAB 店、深圳壹方城 DP 店等 15 家指定门店（具体名单待定），持续至 4 月 12 日。

item.title: lululemon 发布全新高尔夫系列
item.guid: lululemon-发布全新高尔夫系列
item.description:
lululemon ambassador Min Woo Lee will compete in the year's first golf major tournament wearing custom brand apparel, with ambassador Max Homa also competing. Simultaneously, several lululemon golf collection products have been refreshed and launched. lululemon 大使李旻宇（Min Woo Lee）将身着品牌定制服装出战年度首场高尔夫大满贯赛事，大使马克斯·霍马（Max Homa）亦同场竞技。与此同时，lululemon 多款高尔夫系列产品同步焕新上市。

    For the men's product line, lululemon has launched casual shirts featuring ShowZero™ technology, available in classic and slim fits; for bottoms, the brand highlights ABC™ Golf series pants and shorts, made with stretchy fabric. For unpredictable spring weather, the brand also introduced a lightweight, packable golf half-zip pullover (with a stowable hood design) and a golf zip vest;

    The women's product line has also been updated, covering sleeveless, short-sleeved, and long-sleeved athletic casual shirts, as well as lightweight half-zip pullovers with quick-drying and sun protection features. New bottoms include the Stretch Twill Golf Stretch Twill Front Pleated Skirt, modeled by ambassador Yana Wilson, which comes with built-in shorts, and the same series also offers pants and shorts.

item.title: 小米推出物流大件「当日达」：11 点前下单，当天送到家
item.guid: 小米推出物流大件「当日达」：11-点前下单，当天送到家
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi officially announced the launch of its "same-day delivery" service for large items, covering 50 cities nationwide. 昨天，小米官宣上线大件物流「当日达」服务，覆盖全国 50 个城市。

This service supports large items such as TVs, air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and ecological chain products. Users who complete their order before 11:00 AM can enjoy the promise of delivery before 24:00 on the same day. The product order interface will clearly mark "Delivered Today," and eligible orders will automatically receive same-day delivery service. 该服务支持电视、空调、冰箱、洗衣机及生态链大件品类，用户在上午 11:00 前完成下单，即可享受当日 24:00 前送达的承诺。商品下单界面将明确标注「今日送达」，符合条件的订单自动享受当日达服务。

item.title: 第 16 届北京国际电影节主海报发布，华纳携经典影片亮相展映
item.guid: 第-16-届北京国际电影节主海报发布，华纳携经典影片亮相展映
item.description:
The 16th Beijing International Film Festival will be held from April 16th to April 26th. The main poster for this year's festival was designed by a team led by Wu Qun, a veteran documentary director and producer at Beijing Radio and Television Station. During the film festival, over 260 excellent Chinese and foreign film works will be screened. 第 16 届北京国际电影节将于 4 月 16 日至 4 月 26 日举办。本届北影节主海报由资深纪录片导演、北京广播电视台制片人吴群带领团队设计。电影节期间，将展映 260 余部中外优秀电影作品。

The poster is themed "Temple of Heaven Reflects a Hundred Flowers, Light and Shadow Illuminate Beijing," adopting a bird's-eye view with swallows flying towards the Temple of Heaven, subtly implying "there's always something beyond." On a gradient background from warm orange to bright yellow, film-shaped circular halos spread out from the Temple of Heaven's Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests, resembling blooming double-petaled golden flowers. This year coincides with the return of the Popular Film Hundred Flowers Awards to Beijing, forming a "Double Festival Carnival" with the Beijing International Film Festival. 海报以「天坛映百花，光影耀京华」为主题，采用鸟瞰视角，以雨燕飞向天坛的构图暗含「天外有天」之意；暖橙至明黄的渐变底色上，胶片形圆光圈以天坛祈年殿为中心层层晕散，形如盛放的重瓣金花。今年恰逢大众电影百花奖回归北京，与北影节共同构成「双节嘉年华」。

Regarding the screening lineup, Warner Bros. is bringing four films this time. "Sinners" and "IT" will both be screened in IMAX format. "One Battle After Another," directed by Paul Thomas Anderson and starring Leonardo DiCaprio, also has multiple IMAX screenings scheduled. 在展映片单方面，华纳兄弟此次带来四部影片。《罪人》（Sinners）与《IT》均将以 IMAX 规格放映，《一战再战》（One Battle After Another）由保罗·托马斯·安德森执导，莱昂纳多·迪卡普里奥领衔主演，同样安排了多场 IMAX 放映。

The most anticipated is "The Lord of the Rings" trilogy 4K extended edition, which marks the series' first appearance in mainland cinemas. 最受瞩目的是《指环王》三部曲 4K 加长版，这也是该系列首次登陆内地院线。

item.title: 泰国纯爱喜剧《错时告白》官宣 5·20 上映
item.guid: 泰国纯爱喜剧《错时告白》官宣-5·20-上映
item.description:
The Thai pure romance comedy film "Confession at the Wrong Time" has officially announced its release date for May 20th this year, simultaneously unveiling its "Crush" version Chinese poster. 泰国纯爱喜剧电影《错时告白》官宣定档今年 5 月 20 日，并同步发布「暗恋」版中国海报。

The film is produced by GDH559, the golden production team behind "Bad Genius" and "How to Make Millions Before Grandma Dies." It stars popular Thai actor Ong-art Natithong and actress Prienpichaya Kemarana-kun, telling the story of a pair of ambiguous individuals who have feelings for each other but lack the courage to confess, filling their youth with missed opportunities and waiting from high school to adulthood. 影片由电影《天才枪手》《姥姥的外孙》金牌制作团队 GDH559 出品，泰国人气男星翁拉维·那提通与女星普莉恩皮察雅·克玛拉娜君领衔主演，讲述一对彼此有好感却缺乏勇气告白的暧昧期男女，从高中到步入社会，在错过与等待中填满青春的故事。
